tagline: Teable adopts a concise spreadsheet interface, yet creates powerful database applications
description:
Teable is a new generation open-source database platform. It provides an intuitive spreadsheet-like experience, while being powered by a high-performance Postgres database underneath, combining ease of use with powerful data processing capabilities.

**Key Features:**
- **High Performance**: Built on the Postgres core, it effortlessly handles millions of records with extremely fast response times.
- **Modern Interface**: Offers multiple views including grid, kanban, gallery, and forms, with a clean and user-friendly design.
- **Real-time Collaboration**: Supports multi-user online collaboration with real-time data synchronisation.
- **Automation & API**: Provides powerful RESTful APIs to enable flexible integration and automation.

**Learn More:**
- [Teable Official Website](https://teable.ai)
- [Teable GitHub Repository](https://github.com/teableio/teable)
- [Help Documentation](https://help.teable.ai)
author: teableio

releaseNotes.en_US:
- Latest upstream release release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 adds real-time voice input for AI text boxes.
- Chat now supports reasoning effort, tagged references in the queue, and easier editing of queued messages.
- Fixes and improvements include AI response regeneration with the selected model/reasoning effort, collaborator notification fixes, Markdown collaborative editing improvements, and AI input stability improvements.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- Latest upstream release release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 adds real-time voice input for AI text boxes.
- Chat now supports reasoning effort, tagged references in the queue, and easier editing of queued messages.
- Fixes and improvements include AI response regeneration with the selected model/reasoning effort, collaborator notification fixes, Markdown collaborative editing improvements, and AI input stability improvements.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- L'ultima versione upstream release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 aggiunge l'input vocale real-time per le caselle di testo AI.
- La chat ora supporta lo sforzo di ragionamento, i riferimenti contrassegnati nella coda e la modifica più semplice dei messaggi in coda.
- Le correzioni e i miglioramenti includono la rigenerazione della risposta AI con il modello/ragionamento selezionato, correzioni delle notifiche dei collaboratori, miglioramenti della modifica collaborativa Markdown e miglioramenti della stabilità dell'input AI.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- Siste oppstrømsutgivelse release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 legger til real-time stemmeinndata for AI tekstbokser.
- Chat støtter nå resonnementarbeid, merkede referanser i køen og enklere redigering av meldinger i kø.
- Rettelser og forbedringer inkluderer AI-responsregenerering med den valgte modellen/resonneringsinnsatsen, rettelser for samarbeidsvarsling, forbedringer for samarbeidsredigering i Markdown og AI-inndatastabilitetsforbedringer.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- 上游最新版本 release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 为 AI text boxes 增加了实时语音输入。
- Chat 现在支持 reasoning effort、队列中的标签化 references，以及更方便地编辑排队消息。
- 修复和改进包括按所选 model/reasoning effort 重新生成 AI 回复、协作者通知修复、Markdown 协同编辑改进，以及 AI input 稳定性改进。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- upstream の最新リリース release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 は、AI text boxes にリアルタイム音声入力を追加します。
- Chat は reasoning effort、キュー内 references のタグ表示、キュー済みメッセージの編集改善に対応しました。
- 修正と改善には、選択した model/reasoning effort による AI 応答再生成、collaborator 通知修正、Markdown 共同編集改善、AI input 安定性改善が含まれます。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- upstream 최신 릴리스 release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665는 AI text boxes에 실시간 음성 입력을 추가합니다.
- Chat은 이제 reasoning effort, 큐의 tagged references, 큐 메시지 편집 개선을 지원합니다.
- 수정 및 개선 사항에는 선택한 model/reasoning effort로 AI 응답 재생성, collaborator 알림 수정, Markdown 공동 편집 개선, AI input 안정성 개선이 포함됩니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- La derniere release upstream release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 ajoute la saisie vocale en temps reel pour les AI text boxes.
- Chat prend maintenant en charge reasoning effort, les references sous forme de tags dans la queue et une edition plus simple des messages en queue.
- Les correctifs et ameliorations incluent la regeneration des reponses AI avec le model/reasoning effort selectionne, des correctifs de notifications collaborateur, des ameliorations de l'edition collaborative Markdown et une meilleure stabilite de AI input.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- Das aktuelle upstream Release release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 ergaenzt Echtzeit-Spracheingabe fuer AI text boxes.
- Chat unterstuetzt nun reasoning effort, getaggte References in der Queue und leichteres Bearbeiten von Queue-Nachrichten.
- Korrekturen und Verbesserungen umfassen AI-Response-Regeneration mit ausgewaehltem Model/reasoning effort, Collaborator-Notification-Fixes, Verbesserungen am kollaborativen Markdown-Editing und stabilere AI input.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- Senaste uppströmsversionen release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 lägger till real-time röstinmatning för AI textrutor.
- Chatten stöder nu resonemang, taggade referenser i kön och enklare redigering av köade meddelanden.
- Korrigeringar och förbättringar inkluderar AI-svarsregenerering med den valda modellen/resonemangsinsatsen, korrigeringar av samarbetsaviseringar, förbättringar av samarbetsredigering i Markdown och förbättringar av AI ingångsstabilitet.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Η πιο πρόσφατη ανοδική κυκλοφορία release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 προσθέτει φωνητική είσοδο real-time για πλαίσια κειμένου AI.
- Το Chat υποστηρίζει πλέον την προσπάθεια συλλογισμού, τις αναφορές με ετικέτα στην ουρά και την ευκολότερη επεξεργασία των μηνυμάτων στην ουρά.
- Οι διορθώσεις και οι βελτιώσεις περιλαμβάνουν αναγέννηση απόκρισης AI με το επιλεγμένο μοντέλο/προσπάθεια συλλογισμού, διορθώσεις ειδοποιήσεων συνεργατών, βελτιώσεις συλλογικής επεξεργασίας Markdown και βελτιώσεις σταθερότητας εισόδου AI.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- Najnovije uzvodno izdanje release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 dodaje real-time glasovni unos za AI tekstualne okvire.
- Chat sada podržava pokušaj razmišljanja, označene reference u redu čekanja i lakše uređivanje poruka u redu čekanja.
- Popravci i poboljšanja uključuju AI regeneraciju odgovora s odabranim modelom/naporima rasuđivanja, popravke obavijesti suradnika, Markdown poboljšanja suradničkog uređivanja i AI poboljšanja stabilnosti unosa.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- A versão upstream mais recente release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z. 1665 adiciona a entrada de voz real-time às caixas de texto AI.
- O chat suporta agora o esforço de raciocínio, referências marcadas na fila e edição mais fácil das mensagens na fila.
- As correções e melhorias incluem a regeneração da resposta AI com o modelo/esforço de raciocínio selecionado, correções de notificação de colaboradores, melhorias de edição colaborativa Markdown e melhorias de estabilidade de entrada AI.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- В последней версии release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665 добавлен голосовой ввод real-time для текстовых полей AI.
- Чат теперь поддерживает рассуждения, помеченные ссылки в очереди и упрощенное редактирование сообщений в очереди.
- Исправления и улучшения включают регенерацию ответа AI с выбранной моделью/рассуждением, исправления уведомлений соавторов, улучшения совместного редактирования Markdown и улучшения стабильности ввода AI.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- En son yukarı akış sürümü release.2026-05-12T16-05-24Z.1665, AI metin kutuları için real-time ses girişi ekler.
- Sohbet artık muhakeme çabasını, kuyruktaki etiketli referansları ve sıraya alınmış mesajların daha kolay düzenlenmesini destekliyor.
- Düzeltmeler ve iyileştirmeler arasında seçilen model/akıl yürütme çabasıyla AI yanıtının yeniden oluşturulması, ortak çalışan bildirimi düzeltmeleri, Markdown ortak düzenleme iyileştirmeleri ve AI giriş kararlılığı iyileştirmeleri yer alıyor.
